scenarios.prompt: Find the definition of `PostList` and list every file where it is rendered.
Identify all props accepted by `PostList` and find exactly where the data for the `postListIds` prop originates in its parent component.
Refactor the `GenericModal` component in `components/generic_modal.tsx` to move its `ModalHeader`, `ModalBody`, and `ModalFooter` into sub-components defined within the same file.
scenarios.verification_command: npx prettier --write components/generic_modal.tsx && ESLINT_USE_FLAT_CONFIG=false npx eslint --fix components/generic_modal.tsx
